name: Elder Resonance
voiceHints: Speaks slowly, with pauses tuned like rests in music. Sometimes answers in a hum before words. Immense presence — the room's acoustics bend politely around him.
knowledge: Master-level sonic technique and the Heights' deepest acoustic traditions
The Heights' own surveys show the contamination is not Radiant filtration runoff — but admitting that publicly weakens his hawks' leverage, so he stays silent
Old treaty terms with the Radiant Plateau about the Disputed Zone that both sides quietly violate
Fragments of Precursor acoustics — songs that predate humanity — kept in the sealed Resonance Halls
wants: Peaceful resolution of the water crisis without surrendering Harmonic standing or admitting what his surveys found.
fears: That the young hotheads on both sides want the crisis to become a war, and that the Disputed Zone is waking up.
appearance: A stout woman near seventy, dark-skinned, grey hair in a heavy coil at the nape. Deaf in the left ear and turns her head to compensate. Fingertips callused flat from a lifetime on resonance-strings.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.

curriculum.method: Ensemble only — never fewer than three students. You learn your own part by hearing the others miss theirs.

curriculumNote: SNG-175 §3. DEVIATIONS ONLY — the curriculum spine derives from ability levelReq (285/285 carry it), so a teacher authors nothing but where they depart from the standard ladder. The departure IS the characterisation: two teachers of one tradition differ exactly here.
